_comment: Deterministic hook wiring (never calls a model): lint-dispatch.sh (lint lane) + test-runner.sh (unit-test lane). This file lives at the agentic_eng artefact-library root. To activate it for a project, merge this 'hooks' block into that project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json), or symlink it. Paths use $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR; if a script lives elsewhere than the active project root, swap in its absolute path. The two scripts share the PreToolUse Bash commit gate but own separate lanes (lint vs tests); test-runner adds no PostToolUse hook, so it never races the per-edit linter.
